description: Service is the Schema for the services API

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents. Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to. Cannot be updated. In CamelCase. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: ServiceSpec defines the desired state of Service

appVersion.description: AppVersion is the version of the service deployed by the referenced chart

chart.description: HelmChart is the name of the Helm chart used to deploy the service

chartVersion.description: ChartVersion is the version of the Helm chart used to deploy the service

description.description: Description of the service to be used when the service is described

helmRepo.description: HelmRepo is the Helm repository where to fetch the helm chart

serviceIcon.description: ServiceIcon is an image associated with this service

settings.description: Settings declares the fields the user is allowed to customize when deploying a service with the helm chart referenced by this service class.

additionalProperties.description: ServiceSetting is an alias to ChartSetting. Should reduce misunderstandings of what kind of settings are handled in a particular context.

enum.description: Enumeration of allowed values, for types string, number, integer

maximum.description: Maximal allowed value, for number, integer

minimum.description: Minimal allowed value, for number, integer

type.description: Type of the setting (string, bool, number, or integer)

shortDescription.description: ShortDescription of the service to be used in lists

values.description: Values are the values provided by the operator. They are used to customize the deployment of the service.

status.description: ServiceStatus defines the observed state of Service
